$comment: ABOUTME: JSON-schema contract for build-agent responses (Story 7.2-001). ABOUTME: Draft 2020-12; extra fields allowed for forward-compat.
title: BuildAgentResponse
description: Structured result returned by a build agent dispatched by the orchestrator.

branch_name.description: Feature branch the agent worked on, e.g. feature/7.2-001.

commit_sha.description: SHA of the commit the agent produced.

pr_number.description: Pull request number, when the agent created one.

error_summary.description: Human-readable failure summary when build_status is FAILED.
